action.reasoning: Observation: Starting with empty workspace, first iteration. Analysis: Must establish working pipeline with SB3 PPO + FlatObsWrapper for Minigrid (handles image+mission+direction), train briefly on multiple envs in VecEnv to measure time, implement matching predict.py with argparse+wrapper for eval contract. Decision: Train PPO with 20k timesteps on all 10 envs (cycled in 8 vecs), log metrics, submit eval immediately for baseline and timing.
